title: Cuisinart® Chef’s Classic™ Stainless Steel Cookware Set | 11-Piece: Saucepans, Frying Pans, Stockpot, Steamer | Induction-Ready, Aluminium-encapsulated Base | Cool Grip™ Handles
features: PROFESSIONAL PERFORMANCE, EVERYDAY EASE Cook with confidence using stainless steel cookware that delivers restaurant-quality results at home. The mirror-polished finish adds timeless style to your kitchen.
Fast, Even Heating Say goodbye to hot spots. The aluminium-encapsulated base heats quickly and distributes heat evenly for consistent cooking across every dish.
Built for All Hobs From gas and electric to induction, this set is ready for any hob. It’s a versatile choice that adapts to your kitchen setup with ease
Precision Cooking Made Simple Integrated measurement markings inside the pans take the guesswork out of recipes – perfect for sauces, soups, and more.
Cool, Comfortable Handling Cool Grip handles stay cool on the hob and offer extra support when lifting or pouring, giving you control and confidence.
Effortless Cleanup Spend less time at the sink. This set is dishwasher safe and designed to resist discolouration, food reactions, and lingering flavours.

Everything You Need in One Set Includes a 1.4L and 2.4L saucepan with lids, a 2.8L sauté pan with helper handle and lid, a 7.6L stockpot with lid, 20cm and 25cm frying pans, and an 18cm steamer insert – ideal for steaming vegetables or fish.
description: "Discover the Chef’s Classic™ Stainless Steel 11-Piece Cookware Set - Where Timeless Design Meets Everyday Performance Your all-in-one cookware solution designed to elevate everyday meals and special occasions is here. With 11 essential pieces, this set gives you the freedom to sauté, simmer, steam, and sear with confidence, whether you're cooking for one or entertaining a crowd. From the 1.4-litre and 2.4-litre saucepans to the generous 7.6-litre stockpot, each piece is crafted with a gleaming mirror finish that brings classic elegance to your kitchen. The aluminium-encapsulated base ensures fast, even heating across all hob types - including induction - so you can say goodbye to hot spots and hello to consistent results. Designed for precision and ease, the stainless steel cooking surface won’t discolour, react with food, or alter flavours. Built-in measurement markings make it easy to follow recipes without extra tools, while the Cool Grip™ helper handle offers added support and balance when lifting or pouring. Need to steam vegetables or fish? The 18cm steamer insert has you covered. And with tight-fitting glass lids that lock in flavour and moisture, every dish is cooked to perfection. When you're done, simply pop everything in the dishwasher for effortless cleanup. Whether you're a seasoned chef or just starting out, the Chef’s Classic™ Cookware Set delivers professional performance with everyday practicality - all in one beautifully designed collection."
